title: Pungent Mediterranean Puff
description: A pescatarian-friendly puff pastry filled with spicy Thai red curry paste and crispy feta cheese, perfect for adventurous palates.

ingredients.name: Thai Red Curry Paste
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, pungent paste for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Chopped Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: fresh is best, but dried will do in a pinch

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: preferably sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Spread the Thai red curry paste evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
Arrange the shrimp on top of the curry paste, making sure to leave some space between each one.
Sprinkle the feta cheese and chopped parsley over the shrimp.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is cooked through.
